commands.review_summary:
The PR adds structured `core/doctor/configured-plugin-installs` health findings and package dry-run effects for configured plugin install problems while leaving real install/update mutation in the existing legacy repair path.

PR surface: Source +476, Tests +160. Total +636 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR adds a structured diagnostic surface rather than reporting a current-main bug. The changed behavior is source-verifiable and test-backed, but not yet shown with real CLI output.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining action is maintainer review of a protected draft plus contributor-supplied real behavior proof, not a safe automated repair.

target.title: Doctor: expose configured plugin install findings
target.body:
## Summary
- add structured `core/doctor/configured-plugin-installs` findings for configured plugins that are missing install records, missing package payloads, deferred during package update, stale version-bound runtime packages, or repairable package metadata
- expose dry-run package repair effects for those findings
- keep real package install/update mutation in the existing legacy configured plugin install repair path

## Contract
- No public SDK, plugin, or config contract changes.
- This is split from #96169 so plugin registry findings and configured package install findings can be reviewed independently.

## Validation
- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/commands/doctor/shared/missing-configured-plugin-install.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts --reporter=dot`
- `node_modules/oxfmt/bin/oxfmt --check src/commands/doctor/shared/missing-configured-plugin-install.ts src/commands/doctor/shared/missing-configured-plugin-install.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts`
- `node_modules/oxlint/bin/oxlint src/commands/doctor/shared/missing-configured-plugin-install.ts src/commands/doctor/shared/missing-configured-plugin-install.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts`
- `node node_modules/@typescript/native-preview/bin/tsgo.js -p tsconfig.core.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core.tsbuildinfo --declaration false --singleThreaded --checkers 1`
- `node node_modules/@typescript/native-preview/bin/tsgo.js -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.test.src.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/test-src.tsbuildinfo --declaration false --singleThreaded --checkers 1`
- `node scripts/plugin-sdk-surface-report.mjs --check`
- `git diff --check`
